landing.hero_subtitle: "Hi there! I’m Xeni, and I’ve been designed to take the 'busy work' off your plate. I handle your customer conversations with a human touch, processing orders from start to finish. I verify all the payments, track every item in your stock, and even create your marketing content. You build the brand; I’ll run the shop."
landing.features_subtitle: I’ve assembled five specialized smart assistant to live inside your business. They don’t just "process data” they take ownership of your daily hustle so you can focus on the big picture.

conversation.name: The Front Desk
conversation.description: "I’m your Front Desk. I handle the 'Hello' so you don't have to. I stay awake 24/7 on Messenger to chat with your customers in Bangla and English. If a question gets too personal or tricky, I’ll gently tap you on the shoulder to take over."
features: Smart intent detection (product inquiry, order status, complaint)
Human handoff with full conversation context
conversation.locked_message: Available on Starter plan and above

order.name: The Operations Lead
order.description: "I’m your Operations Lead. My job is to get orders out the door. I verify every payment and instantly book the pickup with Pathao or Steadfast. I make sure the journey from 'ordered' to 'delivered' is a straight line."
order.locked_message: Available on Professional plan and above

inventory.name: The Inventory Manager
inventory.description: "I’m your Inventory Manager. I keep a hawk-eye on your stock levels. I’ll make sure you never oversell a popular item, and I’ll send you a 'heads-up' when it’s time to restock based on how fast things are moving."
inventory.locked_message: Available on Professional plan and above

creative.name: The Creative Director
creative.description: "I’m your Creative Director. I take your products and give them a voice. I’ll write your Facebook captions and design your ad images in both languages, making sure your brand looks professional and stops the scroll every single time."

intelligence.name: The Growth Consultant
intelligence.description: "I look past the numbers to tell you the story of your growth. I’ll point out your best-selling hours, identify which products are your real winners, and suggest exactly where you should invest next. I don't just give you reports; I give you a roadmap to scale."

auth.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your XENI account
auth.register_subtitle: Start automating your online shop for free

setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.subtitle: Follow these steps to set up your XENI AI agents and integrations
setup.help_text: If you encounter any issues during setup, our support team is here to help.

steps.title: Go to FB Pages section
steps.description: Navigate to "FB Pages" in the sidebar menu. Click "Connect Page" to begin the Facebook authorization process.

steps.title: Authorize XENI
steps.description: A Facebook popup will appear. Log in with your Facebook account (the one that manages your Business Page). Grant XENI permission to manage messages on your Page.

steps.title: Select Your Page
steps.description: After authorization, select which Facebook Page you want to connect. The Conversation Agent will automatically start responding to messages on this page.

steps.title: Test It
steps.description: Send a test message to your Facebook Page from another account. Within seconds, the AI should automatically reply. If it doesn't, check the Inbox section for AI/Human mode toggle.

steps.title: Create your shop
steps.description: Go to "My Shop" and fill in your shop name, phone number, address, and other details. This information is used for order processing and courier booking.

steps.title: Add products
steps.description: Go to "Products" and add your product catalog. Include product name, price (in BDT), stock quantity, and a clear description. The AI uses this information to recommend products to customers.

steps.title: Set up categories
steps.description: Organize products into categories for easier management. The Conversation Agent references categories when helping customers find products.

steps.title: How bKash/Nagad verification works
steps.description: When a customer sends a payment via bKash or Nagad, they share the Transaction ID (TrxID) with you via Messenger. The Order Processing Agent can verify this payment automatically.

steps.title: For automatic verification (Professional+ plan)
steps.description: If you have the Professional plan or above, the Order Processing Agent will automatically detect payment messages, extract the TrxID, and verify it against bKash/Nagad APIs.

steps.title: For manual verification
steps.description: You can manually verify payments in the Orders section. Click on an order, enter the TrxID, and mark it as "verified". The system will then proceed to courier booking if auto-courier is enabled.

steps.title: Pathao Courier
steps.description: XENI integrates with Pathao for automated courier pickup booking. When an order is verified, the system can automatically book a Pathao pickup from your shop address.

steps.title: Steadfast Courier
steps.description: For Steadfast integration, you'll need your Steadfast API key and Secret Key. Contact Steadfast to get your merchant credentials, then share them with XENI support.

steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Once configured: 1) Detect a verified payment 2) Auto-create the courier booking 3) Share tracking number with customer via Messenger 4) Update order status in your dashboard.

steps.title: What the Creative Agent does
steps.description: The Creative Agent generates product descriptions, social media captions, and promotional ad images using AI. It works in both Bangla and English.

steps.title: How to use it
steps.description: Go to "Creative" in the sidebar. Select the type of content you want (caption, product description, or image). Enter your product details and click "Generate".

steps.title: Requirements
steps.description: The Creative Agent requires the Premium plan. No additional API keys are needed from you — it's all handled by XENI's infrastructure.

steps.title: What the Intelligence Agent does
steps.description: The Sales Intelligence Agent analyzes your sales data to identify trends, peak selling hours, top-performing products, and provides AI recommendations to grow your business.

steps.title: How to use it
steps.description: Go to "Analytics" in the sidebar. Click "Generate AI Insights" to run the Intelligence Agent. It analyzes orders, conversations, and products for data-driven recommendations.

steps.title: Requirements
steps.description: Requires the Premium plan and at least some order history for meaningful insights. The more data you have, the better the recommendations.

steps.title: Choose your plan
steps.description: Go to "Billing" to see available plans. Starter (৳2,500/mo) includes the Conversation Agent. Professional (৳7,500/mo) adds Order Processing and Inventory. Premium (৳25,000/mo) includes all 5 agents.

steps.title: Payment methods
steps.description: Pay via SSLCommerz which supports bKash, Nagad, bank cards (Visa/Mastercard), and internet banking. All pricing is in BDT. Your subscription renews monthly.

steps.title: Upgrade or downgrade
steps.description: You can switch plans anytime. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.upgrade_required: This feature requires a plan upgrade
errors.subscription_needed: You need an active subscription to use this feature
